Mediterranean Production Centre 
MEDSEA_ANALYSISFORECAST_WAV_006_017 
 
 Issue: 2.4 
Contributors: Charikleia Oikonomou, Dimitra Denaxa, Gerasimos Korres. 
Approval date by the CMEMS product quality coordination team: 15/11/2025 
 
 
 
 
  
 

QUID for MED MFC Products 
MEDSEA_ANALYSISFORECAST_WAV_006_017 
Ref: 
Date: 
Issue: 
CMEMS-MED-QUID-006-017 
28 May 2025 
2.4  
 
                                                      Page 2/ 48 
CHANGE RECORD 
 
Issue Date § Description of Change Author Validated By 
1.2 January 
2019 
All Release of the new version 
(MEDWAM3) of the Med -
waves analysis and forecast 
product at 1/24° 
resolution. Upgrades since 
previous version (Q2/2018) 
include: i) upgrade of WAM 
model version from V4.5.4 
to V4.6.2, ii) inclusion of 
non-linear wave -wave 
interactions for shallow 
water, iii) tuning of WAM 
input and dissipation 
source terms, and iv) 
tuning of spectral 
steepness. 
Anna 
Zacharioudaki 
Vladyslav Lyubartsev (PQ 
Responsible) 
1.3 December 
2019 
I.3, II.1, 
II.2, V, 
VI 
Updates of the new version 
Q1/2020 with respect to 
the previous version 
Q1/2019 include: i) daily 
forecast cycle starting at 
00:00 UTC instead of 12:00 
UTC. This is a technical 
change with no changes in 
product quality, and ii) 
additional assimilation of 
SENTINEL-3B observations. 
Quality changes are 
marginal and are described 
in Section VI. 
Anna 
Zacharioudaki 
Vladyslav Lyubartsev (PQ 
Responsible) 
2.0 January 
2021 
All New Product (Q2/2021), 
including the following 
updates with respect to 
the previous version 
(Q1/2020):   
i) one-way coupling with 
hourly currents and sea 
level from MedPHY  
ii) additional assimilation 
of CFOSAT and HAIYANG-
2B observations, and  
iii) inclusion of a 2nd 
forecast cycle 
Anna 
Zacharioudaki 
Emanuela Clementi (Med-MFC 
Deputy) 
2.1 September 
2021 
II, V, VI Updates of the new 
version (Q4/2021) with 
respect to the previous 
version (Q2/2021) include 
the following upstream 
Anna 
Zacharioudaki 
Emanuela Clementi (MedMFC 
Deputy) 
QUID for MED MFC Products 
MEDSEA_ANALYSISFORECAST_WAV_006_017 
Ref: 
Date: 
Issue: 
CMEMS-MED-QUID-006-017 
28 May 2025 
2.4  
 
                                                      Page 3/ 48 
data changes (Q4/2021):   
i) nesting with GLO-waves 
ii) use of higher spatial 
(1/10°) and temporal 
resolution ECMWF winds 
Quality changes are 
marginal and are described 
in Section VI. 
2.2 November 
2022 
All Updates of the new 
version (Q4/2022) with 
respect to the previous 
version (Q4/2021) include:  
i) upgrade of WAM model 
version from Cycle 4.6.2 to 
Cycle 6,   
ii) tuning of WAM model 
physics,    
iii) implementation of 
Charnock parameter 
reduction for strong winds, 
iv)  Additional assimilation 
of Sentinel-6A 
observations.   
Charikleia 
Oikonomou 
Anna Chiara Goglio (PQ 
Leader) 
2.3 September 
2023 
All Updates of the new 
version (Q4/2023) with 
respect to the previous 
version (Q4/2022) include: 
i) Implementation of wind 
gustiness 
parameterisation,  
ii) Improved error 
covariance matrix in the 
data assimilation module 
for significant wave height 
observations,  
iii) Delivery of new 
variables: height of the 
highest crest and 
maximum crest trough 
wave height. 
Charikleia 
Oikonomou 
Anna Chiara Goglio (PQ 
Leader) 
2.4 May 2025 All Assimilation of wind speed 
observations.  
Charikleia 
Oikonomou 
Lucia Gualtieri (PQ Leader)

ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Definition 
ADR, ION, Aeg, LEV, SWM,NWM, TYR, ATL, ALB Sub-regions: Adriatic, Ionian, Aegean, Levantine, 
Southwest Med,Northwest Med, Tyrrhenian, 
Atlantic, Alboran 
CMEMS Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring 
Service 
CORR  Pearson Correlation Coefficient 
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number  
ECMWF European Centre for Medium-Range Weather 
Forecasts 
GEBCO General Bathymetric Chart of the Oceans 
GLO-WAVES Copernicus Marine Global Wave Model 
component 
Hc,max Maximum crest trough wave height 
HCMR Hellenic Centre for Marine Research 
Hmax Maximum Wave Height 
Hm0 Spectral Significant Wave Height (zero-moment) 
IFS Integrated Forecasting System (ECMWF 
operational model) 
LR_SLOPE Linear Regression Slope 
Mdir Mean Wave Direction 
Med-MFC Mediterranean Monitoring and Forecasting 
Centre 
MFC Monitoring and Forecasting Centre 
MWP Mean Wave Period 
NRT Near-Real-Time 
NWP Numerical Weather Prediction 
PU Production Unit 
PQ Product Quality 
RMSD Root-Mean-Square Difference 
SWH Significant Wave Height 
SI Scatter Index 
TAC Thematic Assembly Centre  
Tm02 Spectral moments (0,2) wave period 
Tp Peak Wave Period 
U10 Wind speed at 10 m height 
WAM WAve Model (third-generation spectral wave 
model)
